analysis.summary_en: Explosive risk-on session in Taipei: TAIEX +4.57% to 40,705 led by a semiconductor melt-up. TSMC +6.56%, MediaTek limit-up +9.96%, ASE +9.83%, UMC +5.05%. The move looks like a catch-up rally to overnight/weekend positive AI infrastructure news (South Korea's 260k GPU plan leaning on Taiwan, agentic AI server revival, HBM/DRAM upcycle, Yageo bullish on passives). The huge negative ADR-vs-local divergence (TSM ADR only +0.41% vs 2330.TW +6.56%) strongly suggests Taiwan is closing a gap that opened while it was shut, not pricing fresh news. Watch for mean-reversion risk if TSM ADR doesn't confirm tonight in NY.
analysis.summary_zh: 台北今日全面risk-on:加權指數+4.57%收40,705,半導體領軍噴出。台積電+6.56%、聯發科攻上漲停+9.96%、日月光+9.83%、聯電+5.05%。盤面像是補漲先前休市期間的AI基建利多(韓國26萬顆GPU計畫倚賴台廠、Agentic AI伺服器復甦、HBM/DRAM超級循環、國巨看好被動元件)。ADR與本地的大幅負乖離(TSM ADR僅+0.41%、台積電本地+6.56%)顯示這是補漲而非反映新利多。今晚若TSM ADR不跟上,須留意均值回歸風險。

key_stories.headline_en: South Korea's 260,000 Nvidia GPU deployment depends heavily on Taiwan production
key_stories.headline_zh: 韓國26萬顆Nvidia GPU部署計畫高度仰賴台灣製造
key_stories.analysis_en: Reinforces the structural narrative that TSMC CoWoS capacity and ASE advanced packaging are the gating factors for global AI buildouts. Supports today's strength in TSMC, ASE, and MediaTek (sympathy as AI silicon designer). However, this is a narrative reinforcement, not a fresh order announcement — limit-up moves in MediaTek/ASE feel disproportionate to this single article.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 強化台積電CoWoS與日月光先進封裝是全球AI建置瓶頸的長線敘事,支撐今日台積電、日月光、聯發科(AI晶片設計受惠)同步走強。但這屬於敘事強化而非新訂單公告,聯發科與日月光攻漲停的幅度相對於此單一新聞偏大。

key_stories.headline_en: Agentic AI revives general-purpose server demand; Q2 2026 shipments to top 5M units
key_stories.headline_zh: Agentic AI帶動通用伺服器復甦,2026年Q2出貨上看500萬台
key_stories.analysis_en: Bullish for Foxconn and Quanta as ODMs of both AI and now reaccelerating general-purpose servers — broadens the revenue base beyond just GB200/GB300 racks. Foxconn +3.64% and Quanta +1.76% are measured, rational responses. Note Quanta lagging Foxconn — possibly because general-purpose recovery favors broader ODMs over Quanta's AI-skewed mix.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 利多鴻海與廣達等ODM廠,通用伺服器復甦讓營收基礎不再只靠GB200/GB300機櫃。鴻海+3.64%、廣達+1.76%反應理性。廣達相對落後鴻海,可能因通用伺服器復甦對營收結構較均衡的ODM更有利。

key_stories.headline_en: Samsung strike threatens HBM supply; Samsung pulls ahead on commodity DRAM upcycle
key_stories.headline_zh: 三星罷工威脅HBM供應;商品DRAM超級循環使三星獲利領先海力士
key_stories.analysis_en: Memory tightness narrative is a clear positive for any Taiwan memory-adjacent name and for foundries that pick up displaced orders if Samsung disruption materializes. UMC +5.05% on 241M shares is heavy volume — likely a mix of memory-adjacent sympathy and short-covering. Falsifier: Samsung labor dispute resolves quickly without production hit.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 記憶體吃緊敘事利多台廠記憶體相關股,若三星罷工真的影響產能,代工廠也可能承接轉單。聯電+5.05%、成交量2.4億張屬大量,可能混合記憶體相關補漲與軋空。否證條件:三星勞資爭議快速和解、產能未受影響。

key_stories.headline_zh: 聯發科漲停+9.96%,成交量僅378萬張
key_stories.analysis_en: Tape shows high=low=close at 2870 — a locked limit-up with no real price discovery. Volume is low because sellers are absent at the cap. This is a buyer-imbalance event, not validated demand. Tomorrow's open will reveal whether the move is real (gap-and-go) or speculative froth (gap-and-fade). Mechanism to watch: forced ETF/passive rebalancing buys + retail FOMO into AI ASIC narrative.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 盤面顯示最高=最低=收盤2870,屬鎖死漲停、無真實價格發現。量縮是因賣方在漲停板不出貨,屬買盤失衡事件而非經驗證需求。明日開盤將驗證是延續強勢(跳空續攻)或投機泡沫(跳空回測)。觀察機制:ETF被動再平衡買盤+散戶追逐AI ASIC題材。

key_stories.headline_en: Apple announces CEO transition: John Ternus to succeed Tim Cook on Sept 1, 2026; ends net-cash-neutral target
key_stories.headline_zh: 蘋果宣布CEO交棒:John Ternus將於2026年9月1日接替Tim Cook,並放棄淨現金中性目標
key_stories.analysis_en: Ternus is hardware-engineering-rooted, generally read as supplier-friendly continuity. Foxconn (assembler), Largan (3008, optics), and Quanta benefit if hardware-led R&D intensifies. Largan +2.39%, Foxconn +3.64% — measured, no panic. Abandoning cash-neutral may free balance sheet for AI capex/M&A, indirect positive for supply chain. Falsifier: Ternus signals supply-chain diversification away from Taiwan.
key_stories.analysis_zh: Ternus出身硬體工程,市場一般解讀為對供應鏈友善的延續性人選。鴻海(組裝)、大立光(光學)、廣達若硬體研發加重均受惠。大立光+2.39%、鴻海+3.64%反應節制無恐慌。放棄現金中性目標可能釋出資金做AI資本支出或併購,間接利多供應鏈。否證條件:Ternus釋出供應鏈分散、降低台灣依賴的訊號。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Local massively outpaced ADR — Taipei is catching up to prior NY sessions of AI strength rather than leading. Risk: if TSM tonight in NY does NOT rally to close the gap, expect 2330.TW to give back tomorrow. Watch TSM US tonight as the tell.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 本地遠超ADR——台北是補漲先前美股AI強勢,並非領漲。風險:若今晚TSM ADR未上漲收斂價差,2330.TW明日可能回吐。今晚TSM美股表現是關鍵指標。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Largest divergence on the board. ASE Holdings +9.83% (limit-up) while ASX ADR only +0.57%. Either Taipei is pricing in a specific Taiwan-only catalyst (advanced packaging order) or — more likely — local momentum/short-cover overshoot. High mean-reversion risk if ASX doesn't follow tonight.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 全場最大乖離。日月光投控本地+9.83%漲停,ASX ADR僅+0.57%。要嘛是本地反應特定台灣利多(先進封裝訂單),要嘛——較可能——是動能與軋空超漲。若今晚ASX未跟上,均值回歸風險高。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Local +5.05% vs ADR -0.08%. Volume of 241M shares on 2303.TW is enormous — retail/momentum-driven catch-up plus possible Samsung-disruption transfer-order speculation. Treat as speculative until ADR confirms.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 本地+5.05% vs ADR -0.08%。聯電2.4億張成交量極大,屬散戶與動能驅動的補漲,加上三星罷工轉單想像。在ADR確認前視為投機性。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Reverse divergence — HIMX ADR +4.77% but local Himax-related +1.9% only. Local likely catches up tomorrow if no offsetting news. Mild positive setup for tomorrow's open on the local name.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 反向乖離——HIMX ADR +4.77%、本地相關股僅+1.9%。若無對沖性利空,本地明日可能補漲。屬明日開盤的溫和正向設定。

analysis.no_signals_note: Strong-signal day, not a quiet one. Main caveat: a +4.57% TAIEX session with multiple limit-ups on locked tape is a low-information print — many moves are mechanical (catch-up + short-cover + retail FOMO) rather than fundamental. Recommend Michael's wife wait for tomorrow's open and tonight's TSM/ASX ADR action before adding; chase risk is elevated.
